Off Calendar Jan-04-2013 Continued To Apr-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint is Sustained without leave to amend. Opposing party failed to comply with 11-14-2012 court order and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To Dec-07-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendants' Demurrer is continued to December 7, 2012. Opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition and to serve moving party with a file endorsed copy of opposition by Nov. 16, 2012. Judge Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk: M. Smith, Not Reported (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT will be heard in Department 501, the housing court, on the same day and time. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Continued To Jun-28-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK NA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to June 28, 2012, to be heard by Judge Quidachay in Department 501 at 9:30am. Moving party is required to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than June 11 with a cover letter stating the new haring date. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
